top_signals.title: China Urges Better Cooperation With Kyrgyzstan on Green Minerals
top_signals.summary: China urged stronger cooperation with Kyrgyzstan across the green minerals industrial chain, while calling for the protection of the rights and interests of Chinese companies in the country, according to a statement from the Ministry of Commerce on Saturday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Moves Against Youth Protesters Before Parliament Session
top_signals.summary: Indian authorities moved against protesters in New Delhi ahead of demonstrations against unemployment and alleged examination scams, as the movement adds pressure on Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Apple raises iPhone 17 price by 10% in Japan as yen stays weak
top_signals.summary: The starting quote for the entry-level iPhone 17 handset with 256 gigabytes of storage was ¥142,800 ($879.29) on Apple's official website in Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Korean beauty products are becoming mainstream in the U.S. Why there may be even more growth ahead
top_signals.summary: Morgan Stanley forecasts that K-beauty sales in the U.S. can reach approximately $4 billion in 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The White House is dictating access to frontier AI models, shifting power from tech giants, sources say
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration is taking steps to control who gets access to the latest frontier models, people familiar with the matter told CNBC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Watch Oil: Jeffrey Currie Says Crude’s ‘Illusion of Abundance’ Is Gone - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Watch Oil: Jeffrey Currie Says Crude’s ‘Illusion of Abundance’ Is Gone  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Fat cat? Weight-loss drugs may be coming for your overweight pet
top_signals.summary: Startups are testing GLP-1 treatments for overweight cats while pet-food giants are leaning into longevity products as owners spend more on animal health.
